name: Cochran Shoals Unit, Chattahoochee River NRA
notes: Inside the Sope Creek-US 41 delayed harvest reach; daily parking fee.

name: Paces Mill Unit, Chattahoochee River NRA
notes: Boating and bank fishing access at the lower end of the DH section.

name: Sandy Bottom Canoe Access (Toccoa River)
notes: USFS launch marking the lower end of the Toccoa DH reach (approx. location).

name: Unicoi State Park (Smith Creek)
notes: Smith Creek DH starts at the Unicoi Lake dam; state park parking fee.

name: Amicalola Creek DH access (Dawson Forest WMA)
notes: WMA land; GA lands pass/license required.
